title: Xtra Fresh Tunisian Tomato Salad
description: A sour and bouncy Tunisian dish featuring fresh tomatoes, this salad is perfect for a light lunch, and is pescatarian friendly.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and prepare an ice bath.
Cut an X in the bottom of each tomato and blanch them in the boiling water for 10 seconds.
Immediately transfer the tomatoes to the ice bath to stop the cooking process.
Once the tomatoes have cooled, peel and chop them into 1 inch pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the chopped tomatoes, sliced red onion, chopped capers, and chopped parsley.
In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Pour the dressing over the tomato mixture and toss to combine.
If using harissa, stir it in just before serving.
Chill the salad in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the salad cold, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
